text: Top 5 things to do in Maldives that will make you look sexy and awesome!
When going to Maldives, you'll most definitely land in Male Airport.
Male is a small concrete jungle and the capital of Maldives.
But you don't want to spend any time in there.
Maldives is one of the world's most great country, so I recommend doing some research before you go there.
So let's get started!
Top 1: Surfing.
Maldives has 1190 islands.
Endless surf breaks and some of the best waves in the world.
The surfing season in the Maldives depends on the atolls.
But mostly, surfing is good from April till October.
If you're not professional for huge and fast waves, there is a plenty of fun and mellow surf for you.
Rent a boat and discover perfect waves with no crowd in the water.
Top 2 is definitely kitesurfing.
Maldives are also a paradise to play with the wind.
Beginners can enjoy wind and learn all year long.
Advanced will rather come during the monsoon between May and October.
There is (are) unlimited lagoons to enjoy the best private kite surf in the world.
Continuing with water activities.
Top 3 is Jet ski.
Imagine yourself on the motorbike but traveling on water.
Spin around, speed up, or get up close with the island's natural beauty while preserving its quite harmony.
Jet ski is perfect to take your babe for a trip around the island.
If jet ski isn't enough, try fun tubing.
It's something that will make your day!
If you don't like being soft like Chinese tourists as you see on the video, ask a local guide to take you to the waves for some extreme jumping.
Girls will love that as much as you do.
On the strong 4th place is more extreme: free diving.
The coolest way to explore Maldives underwater world.
Maldives are also equally famous for their underwater life, bringing diving and snorkeling as key access in search for a dreamy holiday between the corals.
Maldives offers a fantastic visibility and have some of the clearest waters on earth, with all year round water temperature from 20 to 30 degrees.
If you're a scuba diver, Maldives is a definitely go go.
The most mellow and strong number 5: Island hopping.
Spend the day on the private sand bank, or go see other islands.
Just book your amazing adventure and embrace the nature.
Oh! And of course...Maldives are photographers' dream, so make sure to capture all your fantastic moments!
